writing.title: Writing Task 1: Tell about a past experience
writing.prompt: Write 3 short questions about someone's past experience (using Did/When/Why/How long), then answer them.
writing.sampleAnswer: When did you start learning English? Why did you decide to learn it? I started when I was ten. I decided to learn it because I wanted to travel one day.
checklist: Có ít nhất 2 câu hỏi quá khứ với Did/Wh-word
Trả lời đầy đủ bằng câu có chủ ngữ + động từ

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Explain why something didn't happen
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) explaining why you didn't do something, using didn't + V.
writing.sampleAnswer: I didn't go to the meeting yesterday. I didn't have any time, and I was very busy. I told my manager, but he wasn't angry about it.
checklist: Dùng didn't + V nguyên mẫu (không chia quá khứ)
Giải thích được lý do rõ ràng
Có ít nhất 1 câu was/wasn't kết hợp
